message:
fix(tailscale): strip trailing slash from LocalApiClient base URL

LocalApiClient::with_http() now strips trailing slashes from base_url
to prevent double-slash in URL construction (e.g., "http://host//api"
when base_url was "http://host/" and path was "/api").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
